title: CIRI Leads Effort to Launch Color of Justice Rural Student Initiative
summary: Color of Justice participants listening to opening remarks of the program. When the distinguished judges and legal professionals addressed the students at the Color of Justice program, they saw something big staring back at them: Alaska. All of Alaska. From the North Slope to the Aleutians Islands. Forty students had flown in from all parts of rural Alaska, and in large measure, CIRI is the reason they were able to attend. Color of Justice is a program aimed at getting women and ethnic minority students interested in the legal profession. The...

title: In Memory, March 2016
